site.notes: TBD - A: legalDescription -- King County Recorder / iMap (gis.kingcounty.gov). yearBuilt and existing occupancy -- King County Assessor (blue.kingcounty.gov/assessor). | TBD - C: zoning and all development standards (FAR, height, setbacks, density) -- City of Kirkland Zoning Code (kirklandwa.gov/eplanning or codepublishing.com/WA/Kirkland). | TBD - D: community plan, transit overlays -- Kirkland Comprehensive Plan; TPA check -- PSRC or Sound Transit GIS. Airport influence -- BFI (Boeing Field) ALUCP. Fault zone -- USGS seismic hazard (Seattle fault zone). | TBD - E: Fees -- City of Kirkland permit fee schedule (no NEF equivalent in WA; check impact fees and utility connection fees). | TBD - F: Project type, architect, scope of work. | TBD - G: Inspector contacts -- City of Kirkland Permit Center. | TBD - H: Map rotation and parcel polygon -- capture from King County GIS aerial.
